name: KNEOMEDIA LIMITED
summary: KNeoMedia Limited, a SaaS education publishing company, provides education assessment and games-based learning products to educational markets in Australia and internationally. It publishes and markets games on a license basis through the KNeoWorld.com education games portal, as well as through education departments and distribution agreements. The company was formerly known as Entellect Limited and changed its name to KNeoMedia Limited in May 2015. KNeoMedia Limited is based in Melbourne, Australia.
